data.title: Enerpac Misses Q4 EPS Expectations, Warns Of Industrial Slowdown In FY25
data.description: Enerpac Tool Group shares down after reporting worse-than-expected Q4 EPS results and providing lower-than-expected FY25 guidance.

data.title: Asia And Europe Markets In Red; Oil Recovers Slightly, Gold Nears $2,700 - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: US markets closed lower Tue, with Nasdaq dropping 1%. Earnings mixed, finance outperformed, healthcare disappointed. NY Empire State Manufacturing Index fell to -11.9. Most S&P 500 sectors down, Dow -0.75%, S&P 500 -0.76%, Nasdaq -1.01%. Japan's Nikkei -1.87%, Australia's S&P/ASX 200 -0.41%, India's Nifty 50 -0.31%, China's Shanghai +0.05%, Shenzhen -0.63%, Hong Kong -0.16%. European STOXX 50 -0.66%, DAX -0.53%, CAC -0.47%, FTSE 100 +0.66%. Crude Oil WTI +0.06%, Brent +0.04%, Natural Gas -0.32%, Gold +0.68%, Silver +1.04%, Copper +1.10%. US Futures: Dow -0.04%, S&P 500 +0.03%, Nasdaq 100 +0.12%. US Dollar Index -0.01%, USD/JPY +0.07%, USD/AUD +0.21%.

data.title: Fed's Bostic Projects Just A Single Rate Cut By January — One And Done, For Real?
data.description: Raphael Bostic, the President of the Atlanta Federal Reserve, has projected only one more interest rate cut this year.

data.title: Apple Analyst Predicts A September Quarter Revenue Beat, Allays Fears Over Shorter iPhone Lead Times
data.description: An Apple bull says iPhone lead times have stabilized, which bodes well for the shipments and the tech giant's top-line.

data.title: Tesla Key Exec Says 'We, Robot' Event Had 1,300 'Perfectly Safe' Autonomous Trips Driving Over 2,000 Guests: 'Really Amazing To See Users Take The Robotaxis For Granted'
data.description: Tesla unveiled its dedicated two-seater robotaxi product, nicknamed the Cybercab, complete with butterfly wings that open upwards.
